reviews.review_description:
After the v 83 update I no longer have multiplayer now I only have single player even my friends has the same problem please fix 

We’re not going to buy any more games if  you are change from multiplayer to single player in all of your games. What happen 

The game was great but not anymore

This game is listed as having multiplayer and co-op modes. It currently has neither. My friends and I bought it to race against each other. Now it looks like it's going to the return pile. 

Meta, stop falsely advertising functions of your games.

reviews.review_title: I get dizzy.I get nauseous I can't play.
reviews.review_description:
I can't play for a well while or not that long.  I start getting dizzy. I get motion sickness right away.
I start to want to vomit.

i have been playing dash dash a month after it came out. i was really impressed by how they added maps and they kinda kept the community updated when they were working on stuff behind the scenes . i only have one complaint if anybody even reads these reviews anymore. As someone who put a decent amount of hours into the game and paid full price is there any way i can get my outfits and stuff that i had and i had collected over the years. for some reason after this update where the game became a single player game i no longer have any of my items
As others have stated game doesn't even load as devs gave up on it
Just like Mario Kart Arcade VR, it's bigger!!! AND WOW!!!🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
I uninstall because not working need refund now. Please help . Looks like no easy to get refund.
I bought this game to play multiplayer with my wife. It states there is a multiplayer but only single player mode available.

Game was good 2 years ago until the the devs dropped the ball and abandoned ship and now they shut down the sever making it unplayable the graphic quality went way down to garbage. This game is not even worth a dollar. Mabey if this game had some devs that knew what they were doing this game could have had potential to becoming a 5 star game.

developer_response.body: Hello. We are very sorry you feel that way. Throughout the year, we release updates and events as we can. We spend most resources on increasing unique maps and a dedicated server. The second part is impossible to go on forever due to the high maintenance cost. Back then, we wanted to ensure the highest quality connection so we chose this way, at least we hope you guys get to enjoy the experience we set out to do right from the beginning. As for the new racer, we also permanently drop the price 40% to reflect this as well as adding new maps.

reviews.review_description: Why would they take away multiplayer? Cmon dash dash. That just made this game unplayable :(

developer_response.body: Hi, we never added microtransactions, and we will never do. What we did was to let your unlocked previous exclusives in a new way. Throughout the year, we operate a dedicated server to ensure the best experience possible (Most VR games are p2p). Unfortunately, choosing this route is a lot more costly, and eventually the server will have to close, like almost all online games with a dedicated server. So in our latest update, we try to make up for it by letting you start the game without having to wait for online checking, as well as improve graphics/performance, and add new maps. We hope you will enjoy the game as much as we do :)

reviews.review_description: Personally I’m having a blast with this game! Fast and fun what more do you need?

Graphics for your car and hands are decent, but the world in which you're racing isn't always the best. 

It's annoying that you need to go through the entire tutorial with the silly analog steering before you're allowed to learn to steer properly - for the record this way to steer is awful. Sitting in a chair I was unable to turn to the left and it barely worked turning to the right. 

The only interesting thing here are the weapons and even then the animations for some things are 2d rather than immersive - bee bomb spawns flat bees. 

Overall, Galaxy Kart is much better - but play it on PSVR2 as it looks fantastic on something with power. Not only that, but you can actually steer by moving your hands or attaching a wheel. 

Avoid this game - especially since it hasn't been updated in years.

reviews.review_title: An Experience Only VR Can Do
reviews.review_description:
Let me start by saying this... If you're newer to VR, this game will take some getting used to. The motion captured is very fluid and for some, this may cause dizziness or even motion sickness. The Devs did an excellent job by including many optional settings that can help with this. You can also avoid certain tracks if there are ones that affect you more than others. VR takes time to get used to but the more you play, the more your senses adjust. Just don't don't over do it!

 Now that we got that out of the way... This game is quite AWESOME! I've grown up playing kart racing battle games similar to this that date back to the early 90's. This game does not disappoint. Instead of just pressing buttons, you are now taking aim and even throwing items at fellow kart players. Tracks have obstacles that'll cause a little mischief also. Play the tutorial... Complete the career mode, unlock upgrades and skins to further enhance your gaming experience. As said previously, "this game is quite AWESOME" and must be experienced in a way only VR can do. Let the kart battle begin! 3... 2... 1... GO!!! Vrooooom
I see reviews saying this is mario kart for vr, this does not even come close to mario kart. Nit worth the $25 price tag.

This game took all my money you can’t use actual steering, the drifting is terrible and too sensitive, and the graphics and physics are absolutely terrible you can tell the developers put no effort into this money stealing game, I think they should put a 15 minute free trial so people can try it out before buying.
TO THE DEVS: I think this is a good game, but the main 2 issues are that it’s a very expensive game I would personally have it be 10$ buts it’s 20 and the other issue is that the game hasn’t updated in years (sorry to say but that’s kinda lazy.)
I try to download this games 4 times I have not been successful it's the first game I have  pay for on oluas im thinking of take it backv

developer_response.body: That could have been a problem on the Oculus server. Can you try to restart the headset and download the game again?

reviews.review_description: Great game, I'm a big fan of Mario Kart and this is the closest you can get to it in VR as of 2020!
Won’t play! Tried countless times. Never gets past title screen

developer_response.body:
I assumed you are on the Quest.

There are a few possibilities.

If you are on Quest 2: Press and hold the Oculus button for 1 second.

If you are on Rift or Quest + Link: Press and hold the Menu button for 1 second.

If you are on Quest 2 with Virtual Desktop: You will need to launch the game from the Virtual Desktop's "Games" tab itself. You can press and hold the Menu button for 1 second once you arrive at the start screen.

reviews.review_title: The game does not load on Quest 2
reviews.review_description: The game does not load on Quest 2

developer_response.body:
***UPDATE1***
We have finally found a cause for this. It seems that once you disable the 'Storage permission' upon launching, the game got stuck in the loop.

We have updated the game to fix this and provide instruction in case you got stuck in the loop. Sorry for this inconvenience and we hope you will enjoy racing in Dash Dash World!

***Original Comment***
This currently is a problem on the Oculus side as we have a few complaints recently. 

We have found that simply restarting the device and reinstall it will solve this problem.

Can you please give this a try?

***Original Comment***
